meta.name: Validate property documents with Claude (Anthropic), Google Drive and Slack

parameters.content:
## Automated Property Document Validator

This workflow ingests property document packages submitted via webhook or monitored cloud storage, extracts text from each file, runs Claude AI to verify legal compliance, detect missing or expired documents, flag invalid clauses, and produces a structured validation report with remediation guidance.

### How it works

1. **Trigger** — Webhook submission or Google Drive folder watch
2. **Intake & Register** — Logs submission, assigns case ID, normalises metadata
3. **Download Documents** — Fetches each file from Drive / S3 / URL
4. **Extract Text** — Reads PDF/DOCX content via parser node
5. **Classify Document Type** — Identifies contract, title, disclosure, certificate, etc.
6. **AI Legal Compliance Check** — Claude AI validates each document against jurisdiction rules
7. **Aggregate Validation Results** — Merges per-document findings into a case report
8. **Check Required Doc Checklist** — Detects missing mandatory documents
9. **Route by Compliance Status** — Branches on PASS / FAIL / REQUIRES_REVIEW
10. **Notify Submitter** — Email with full validation report and remediation steps
11. **Alert Legal Team on Slack** — Flags FAIL or critical issues to legal channel
12. **Create Audit Record** — Writes full report to Google Sheets compliance log
13. **Generate PDF Report** — Stores formatted report back to Drive
14. **Return Validation Response** — Sends structured JSON result to caller

### Setup Steps

1. Import workflow into n8n
2. Configure credentials:
   - **Anthropic API** — Claude AI for legal document analysis
   - **Google Drive OAuth** — Document intake and report storage
   - **Google Sheets OAuth** — Compliance audit log
   - **Slack OAuth** — Legal team alerts
   - **SendGrid / SMTP** — Submitter notification emails
3. Set your Google Drive folder IDs for intake and output
4. Configure jurisdiction rules in the AI prompt node
5. Set mandatory document checklist in the Checklist node
6. Activate the workflow

### Sample Webhook Payload
```json
{
  "caseId": "CASE-2025-0871",
  "submitterEmail": "agent@realty.com",
  "propertyAddress": "42 Oak Street, Sydney NSW 2000",
  "transactionType": "sale",
  "jurisdiction": "NSW",
  "documents": [
    {
      "name": "Contract of Sale",
      "type": "contract",
      "driveFileId": "1aBcDeFgHiJkL"
    },
    {
      "name": "Title Search",
      "type": "title",
      "driveFileId": "2mNoPqRsTuVwX"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Document Types Supported
- Contract of Sale / Purchase Agreement
- Certificate of Title / Title Search
- Vendor Disclosure Statement
- Section 32 / Vendor Statement
- Building & Pest Inspection Report
- Strata Report / Body Corporate Docs
- Zoning Certificate / Planning Certificate
- Land Tax Certificate
- Mortgage / Discharge of Mortgage
- Lease Agreement / Tenancy Documents
- Council Rates Notice
- Smoke Alarm / Safety Certificates

### Features
- Multi-document batch validation per submission
- Jurisdiction-aware compliance rules (AU/UK/US configurable)
- Missing document detection against mandatory checklist
- Expiry date validation for time-sensitive certificates
- Critical clause and red-flag detection
- Automated remediation guidance per issue
- Full audit trail in Google Sheets
- PDF validation report stored to Drive

---

**Explore More Automation:**  
[Contact us](https://www.oneclickitsolution.com/contact-us/) to design AI-powered lead nurturing, content engagement, and multi-platform reply workflows tailored to your growth strategy.

## 2. Document Extraction & Type Classification
### PDF Text · DOCX Parse · Document Identification
## 4. Aggregation · Compliance Routing · Notifications · Audit Log

parameters.text:
=You are a senior property law compliance analyst specialising in Australian real estate transactions (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA). Conduct a thorough legal compliance review of the following property document.

**Case Information:**
- Case ID: {{ $json.case.caseId }}
- Property: {{ $json.case.propertyAddress }}
- Transaction Type: {{ $json.case.transactionType }}
- Jurisdiction: {{ $json.case.jurisdiction }}
- Submission Date: {{ $json.case.submittedAt }}

**Document Details:**
- Document ID: {{ $json.document.docId }}
- Document Name: {{ $json.document.name }}
- Declared Type: {{ $json.document.declaredType }}
- AI Detected Type: {{ $json.document.detectedType }}
- Extraction Status: {{ $json.document.extractionStatus }}
- Expiry Dates Found: {{ JSON.stringify($json.document.expiryDatesFound) }}
- Text Length: {{ $json.document.textLength }} characters

**Document Content (first 12,000 chars):**
{{ $json.document.fullText }}

---

**Validation Requirements by Document Type:**

CONTRACT_OF_SALE: Check — parties named and signed, property description complete, purchase price stated, deposit terms, settlement date, special conditions, cooling-off rights disclosure, GST clause, subject-to-finance clause if applicable, vendor warranty clauses.

CERTIFICATE_OF_TITLE: Check — folio identifier, registered proprietor matches vendor, encumbrances listed, easements noted, no adverse possession claims, issue date within 3 months.

VENDOR_DISCLOSURE / SECTION_32: Check — all prescribed matters disclosed (Section 32 Conveyancing Act), zoning, outgoings, services, owners corporation, building permits, title details, vendor statement signature.

STRATA_REPORT: Check — financial status, outstanding levies, pending special levies, building defects, insurance currency, AGM minutes last 2 years, by-laws current.

BUILDING_PEST_REPORT: Check — inspector licence number, inspection date (within 90 days), findings summary, structural defects listed, active pest activity noted, reinspection recommendations.

PLANNING_CERTIFICATE: Check — zoning classification, development restrictions, flood/bushfire overlays, issue date (within 3 months for NSW 10.7).

LAND_TAX_CERTIFICATE: Check — no outstanding land tax, certificate date (within 6 months), property address matches.

SAFETY_CERTIFICATE: Check — smoke alarm compliance, safety switch compliance, pool safety if applicable, compliance date, licensed certifier.

LEASE_AGREEMENT: Check — parties named, term dates, rent amount, bond details, permitted use, maintenance obligations, termination clauses.

**Response Format (JSON only, no markdown):**
{
  "docId": "{{ $json.document.docId }}",
  "documentName": "{{ $json.document.name }}",
  "confirmedType": "DOCUMENT_TYPE_ENUM",
  "typeMismatch": false,
  "complianceStatus": "PASS | FAIL | REQUIRES_REVIEW | INCOMPLETE_DATA",
  "overallRiskLevel": "CRITICAL | HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW",
  "confidenceScore": 88,
  "isExpired": false,
  "expiryDate": null,
  "daysUntilExpiry": null,
  "passedChecks": ["list of checks that passed"],
  "failedChecks": ["list of checks that failed with specific reason"],
  "missingInformation": ["list of required info not found in document"],
  "criticalFlags": ["serious legal issues or red flags found"],
  "warnings": ["non-critical issues or cautions"],
  "clauseIssues": [
    { "clause": "clause description", "issue": "problem found", "severity": "CRITICAL|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW" }
  ],
  "remediationSteps": ["specific actions required to resolve each issue"],
  "legalReferences": ["relevant act/regulation references e.g. Conveyancing Act 1919 s32"],
  "documentSummary": "2-3 sentence plain-English summary of this document's compliance status",
  "requiresLegalReview": false,
  "autoApprovable": false
}

options.systemMessage: You are a property law compliance specialist. Return JSON only — no markdown, no code blocks, no preamble. Be precise and cite specific legal requirements. Flag any issue that could delay settlement or create legal liability. If document text is empty or extraction failed, set complianceStatus to INCOMPLETE_DATA and explain in missingInformation.

parameters.html:
=

🏠 Property Document Validation Report

{{ $json.case.caseId }} • {{ new Date($json.aggregatedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-AU') }}

Property: {{ $json.case.propertyAddress }}

Transaction: {{ $json.case.transactionType }} • Jurisdiction: {{ $json.case.jurisdiction }}

Overall Status: {{ $json.overallStatus }}

{{ $json.summary.totalDocuments }} documents reviewed • {{ $json.summary.passed }} passed • {{ $json.summary.failed }} failed • {{ $json.summary.expired }} expired

{{ $json.missingMandatoryDocuments.length > 0 ? '
⚠️ Missing Mandatory Documents:
    ' + $json.missingMandatoryDocuments.map(d => '
  • ' + d + '
    • ').join('') + '
' : '' }}

Document Results

{{ $json.documentResults.map(doc => '
' + doc.name + '  ' + doc.complianceStatus + '

' + doc.documentSummary + '

' + (doc.criticalFlags.length > 0 ? '

Critical: ' + doc.criticalFlags.join('; ') + '

' : '') + '
').join('') }} {{ $json.allRemediationSteps.length > 0 ? '

Required Actions

    ' + $json.allRemediationSteps.map(s => '
  1. ' + s + '
    2. ').join('') + '
' : '

✅ No remediation required. Documents are compliant.

' }}

Automated validation by AI Property Document Validator • This report does not constitute legal advice. Consult a solicitor for final review.
parameters.subject: =🏠 Property Document Validation — {{ $json.overallStatus }} | {{ $json.case.caseId }}

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.item.json;
return {
  json: {
    success: true,
    caseId: d.case.caseId,
    propertyAddress: d.case.propertyAddress,
    transactionType: d.case.transactionType,
    jurisdiction: d.case.jurisdiction,
    overallStatus: d.overallStatus,
    summary: d.summary,
    missingMandatoryDocuments: d.missingMandatoryDocuments,
    requiresLegalReview: d.requiresLegalReview,
    canAutoApprove: d.canAutoApprove,
    documentResults: d.documentResults.map(doc => ({
      docId: doc.docId,
      name: doc.name,
      type: doc.confirmedType,
      status: doc.complianceStatus,
      riskLevel: doc.overallRiskLevel,
      isExpired: doc.isExpired,
      criticalFlags: doc.criticalFlags,
      remediationSteps: doc.remediationSteps,
      summary: doc.documentSummary
    })),
    allRemediationSteps: d.allRemediationSteps,
    processedAt: d.aggregatedAt
  }
};

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: All documents passed automated compliance checks and are approved for settlement processing.
